title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno & browsers; chat, generate, pull models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing LLM, embedder and chat wrappers around Ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI (TUI) for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for autocomplete & chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with your documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, refactor, or chat with local Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Micronaut & Spring Boot starters and async support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, generate, embeddings and model management; NuGet package.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight async Rust crate wrapping Ollama’s REST API with Tokio and Serde.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated registry of custom Ollama Modelfiles (CodeLlama, SQLCoder, Zephyr, etc.).

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash commands to query local models securely.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for AI-assisted writing, summarization and brainstorming using Ollama.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example scaling Ollama models across GPU workers with autoscaling and batching.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.
